com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXDeviceSymbol

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXBaseGraphicObject, IXBaseSymbol, IXElectricalSymbol, IXGraphicConversions, IXObject, IXPinList<IXElectricalSymbolPin>, IXSymbol, IXWriteableObject

extends IXElectricalSymbol
